name: 🔒 Lane: Barrier Participant B
description: HARD-BARRIER DEMONSTRATION (participant B of 2). Runs in parallel with barrier-a. Both must reach the global barrier before either continues. Participant B performs slightly more work, making it the slower participant — demonstrating that A waits for B at the sync point.

checks.fail: ⚠️  [barrier-b] No workspace config — single package project

checks.prompt: Participant B of the barrier demo: analyse the monorepo package structure. List each package, its role, and whether it has a test suite. This output will be combined with Participant A's output after the barrier synchronisation point.
checks.pass: ✅ [barrier-b] Package analysis complete — arriving at barrier

checks.prompt: After the barrier synchronisation, produce a combined test strategy that covers both the test configuration (from Participant A) and the package structure (from Participant B). List 5 actionable test improvement recommendations. Context: {retryContext}
checks.pass: ✅ [barrier-b] Combined test strategy produced — barrier resolved
